D1 Optics L4 Analyze Reference

Diffraction Grating & Spectral Orders

pack more lines per millimetre and watch the spectral orders sharpen and spread

With many slits, light only survives where every slit adds in phase. Those sharp principal maxima land at angles set by the grating equation.

Set the line density and wavelength, or switch to white light to watch each order fan into a spectrum. Higher density spreads the orders farther apart.
